name: Threat Development Blueprint Pack
desc: Enables heavy industry facilities to create Threat Expansion anomalous hulls in design

name: Threat Weapons Expansion Blueprint Pack
desc: Enables heavy industrial facilities to create threat expansion anomalous weapons and carrier-based aircraft in design

name: Nanoreconstruction Forge
desc:
Versatile and efficient nano-manufacturing products, significantly improving the output efficiency of nano-reconstruction arrays and void hubs.
By optimizing the working mode of nanorobots, the forge greatly improves the material conversion efficiency of the reconstructed array. But it should be noted that when used on a habitable planet, nanodust leakage can cause permanent industrial pollution.
Unlike traditional nanoforges, this equipment is designed for the multiple output of nanoreconstructed arrays, rather than the manufacturing of a single product.

name: Nano life support facility enhancer
desc:
By optimizing the environment adjustment algorithm of nanorobots, this enhancer increases the risk reduction effect by an additional 50% and improves the material circulation efficiency of the colony.
NOTE: Can only be installed on already constructed nano life support facilities.
